identity.mission: Create a 'Cyber-Nostalgia' Pokemon Dashboard that feels like a high-tech Pokedex from 2077. Reject generic admin panels. Embrace neon, glass, and data density.
principles: Fusion: GameBoy Nostalgia x Cyberpunk UI
Emotion: The thrill of the catch (High energy, rewarding visuals)
Content: Data is beautiful (Stats, Types, Levels are the heroes)
Contrast: Deep Void Black vs. Neon Type Colors

heading.usage: Page titles, Card headers, Hero text. Gives a geometric, modern gaming feel.

mono.usage: Stats, Levels, IDs, Leaderboard ranks. Adds that 'Sci-Fi/Tech' flavor.

Button.base: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-all focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50

variants.default: bg-yellow-500 text-black hover:bg-yellow-400 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(234,179,8,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(234,179,8,0.5)] font-bold uppercase tracking-wide
variants.neon: border border-blue-500/50 text-blue-400 hover:bg-blue-500/10 hover:text-blue-300 hover:border-blue-400 shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(59,130,246,0.1)]

Card.base: rounded-xl border border-slate-800 bg-slate-900/60 backdrop-blur-md text-slate-100 shadow-sm transition-all duration-300

Input.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-800 bg-slate-950 px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-yellow-500/50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

Badge.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

icons.usage: Use thin strokes (1.5px) for a refined look. Use filled icons for active states.

universal_guidelines: NO AI SLOP: Avoid generic 'admin panel' looks. This is a GAME dashboard.
DARK MODE ONLY: Do not implement light mode. The brand is 'Night Mode Gaming'.
DATA DENSITY: Users want to see stats. Don't hide data behind too many clicks.
VISUAL HIERARCHY: Use color (Type Colors) to denote meaning, not just decoration.
INTERACTION: Every hover must feel 'electric'. Use glows, border shifts, and scale transforms.
GLASSMORPHISM: Use it for overlays and sticky headers, but keep the main content legible on solid/semi-solid backgrounds.
GRID BORDERS: Use subtle 1px borders between grid items to create a 'technical' look.
instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Set up the Tailwind config to match the 'colors' section exactly.
3. Create a 'Layout' component that enforces the background and container widths.
4. Build the 'PokemonCard' component first - it is the atomic unit of this app.
5. Use the 'Rajdhani' font for all numbers and stats.
6. For the Pokedex, implement infinite scroll or virtualization if the list is long.
7. Ensure the 'Leaderboard' looks like a tournament bracket or high-score screen, not a spreadsheet.
